title: Looking for an advanced calendar?

posts.author: Dor_appSolution (Dor)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’d like to talk about a new improvements to MasterPlan Calendar:

  1. Dashboard widget to connect multiple boards into one calendar!
  2. Year view
  3. Time slot settings
  4. Adding Grid option
  5. Choose “First day of the week”
  6. Performance enhancements

Our calendar app is the most customizable and a top-performing choice on monday, and it probably looks the best too

We invite you to try it yourself!
https://monday.com/marketplace/listing/10000472/masterplan-calendar

posts.author: TeamEasy (Easy Mondays)
posts.cookedHtml:
Awesome @Dor_appSolution great to see a yearly view.
Would be awesome to see quarterly also!

posts.author: Dor_appSolution (Dor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @TeamEasy, Thanks for your suggestion! We’ll consider adding this view.
Feel free to reach out with more ideas or questions.

posts.author: Avigail_Shay (Avigail)
posts.cookedHtml: Absolutely necessary! These kinds of calendar apps are helpful — I truly love the user experience!

posts.author: Dor_appSolution (Dor)
posts.cookedHtml:
We’ve made further progress in improving the MasterPlan Calendar.
Check out the latest features we’ve added:

  1. Custom Initial Date: Need to focus on a future project or event? You can now set the calendar to load on your preferred date.
  2. Toggle Additional Info for “All Day” Events: Choose whether to show or hide extra details for all-day events.
  3. Design and Performance Enhancements: We’ve enhanced performance and made some small design improvements.
